details: The agent successfully navigated to https://github.com/facebook/react/issues, retrieved the page content via browser automation, and correctly reported 820 open issues along with 5 specific, technically detailed issue titles with real issue numbers (#36201, #36200, #36176, #36175, #36169) matching the accessibility tree output. The titles are specific and technical (e.g., referencing TypedArray, Fiber memory, hydration mismatch with script defer), consistent with real GitHub issues. The open issue count of 820 is in the hundreds as expected.
